questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將 AWS 用於其所有 IT 基礎架構。該公司的開發人員可以自行部署應用程式。開發人員希望部署他們的應用程式而無需自己配置基礎架構。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using AWS for all its IT infrastructure. The company's developers are allowed to deploy applications on their own. The developers want to deploy their applications without having to provision the infrastructure themselves. Which AWS service should the developers use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS CloudFormation
A.en: AWS CloudFormation

B.zh: AWS CodeBuild
B.en: AWS CodeBuild

C.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
C.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

D.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
D.en: AWS CodeDeploy

A.zh: 錯誤。CloudFormation 是一項基礎架構即基礎架構 (IaC) 服務，用於定義和管理 AWS 資源的範本。雖然它可以幫助自動化創建資源，但它並不直接支援應用程式開發。開發人員仍然需要定義範本和管理資源。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. CloudFormation is an Infrastructure as a Infrastructure (IaC) service for defining and managing templates for AWS resources. Although it can help automate the creation of resources, it does not directly support application development. Developers still need to define templates and manage resources. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。CodeBuild 是一種持久性整合服務，用於編譯程式碼、執行測試和產生軟體包。它不對應用程式的某些部分負責，因此該選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. CodeBuild is a persistent integration service for compiling code, running tests, and generating software packages. It is not responsible for parts of the application, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。Elastic Beanstalk 是一個平臺即服務 (PaaS)，允許開發人員上傳程式碼並自動處理應用程式部署、負載平衡、擴展和控制。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. Elastic Beanstalk is a platform as a service (PaaS) that allows developers to upload code and automatically handle application deployment, load balancing, scaling and control. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。CodeDeploy是一種部署服務，用於自動化應用程式的部署流程，但它需要開發人員定義部署配置，並且不提供自動化的基礎架構管理。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. CodeDeploy is a deployment service that is used to automate the deployment process of applications, but it requires developers to define deployment configurations and does not provide automated infrastructure management. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Elastic Beanstalk 是一個平臺即服務 (PaaS)，允許開發人員上傳程式碼並自動處理應用程式部署、負載平衡、擴展和控制。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Elastic Beanstalk is a platform as a service (PaaS) that allows developers to upload code and automatically handle application deployment, load balancing, scaling and control. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望從其數據中獲得見解並建立互動式資料視覺化儀錶板。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to gain insights from its data and build interactive data visualization dashboards. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 SageMaker
A.en: Amazon SageMaker

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Rekognition
B.en: Amazon Rekognition

C.zh: 亞馬遜 QuickSight
C.en: Amazon QuickSight

D.zh: 亞馬遜 Kinesis
D.en: Amazon Kinesis

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項用於建置、訓練和部署機器學習模型的機器學習服務。雖然它可以處理數據，但它並不專注於數據視覺化，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a machine learning service for building, training, and deploying machine learning models. Although it can handle data, it is not focused on data visualization, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一項影像和視訊分析服務，用於識別物體、人臉、場景等。它與資料視覺化無關，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is an image and video analysis service for identifying objects, faces, scenes, and more. It has nothing to do with data visualization, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是一項商業智慧服務，旨在建立互動式資料視覺化儀錶板並產生資料見解。這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a business intelligence service designed for creating interactive data visualization dashboards and generating data insights. This option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種即時資料流服務，用於收集、處理和分析流資料。雖然它可以處理數據，但它不會直接用於建立數據視覺化儀錶板，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a real-time data streaming service for collecting, processing, and analyzing streaming data. Although it can process data, it is not directly used to create data visualization dashboards, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項商業智慧服務，旨在建立互動式資料視覺化儀錶板並產生資料見解。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a business intelligence service designed for creating interactive data visualization dashboards and generating data insights. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一位雲端工程師想要將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。工程師將每年存取一些數據，每天存取一些數據。哪種 S3 儲存類別能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A cloud engineer wants to store data in Amazon S3. The engineer will access some of the data yearly and some of the data daily. Which S3 storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: S3 標準
A.en: S3 Standard

B.zh: S3 冰河深度存檔
B.en: S3 Glacier Deep Archive

C.zh: S3 一區-不頻繁訪問（S3 一區-IA）
C.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

D.zh: S3 智能分層
D.en: S3 Intelligent-Tiering

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：S3標準適合頻繁存取的數據，儲存成本較高。不適合某些資料一年只造訪一次的場景。結論：錯誤。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: S3 Standard is suitable for frequently accessed data and has high storage costs. It is not suitable for scenarios where some data is only accessed once a year. Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 適合長期儲存很少被存取的資料。檢索時間較長，不適合日常存取的資料。結論：錯誤。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: S3 Glacier Deep Archive is suitable for long-term storage of data that is rarely accessed. The retrieval time is long and is not suitable for data that is accessed daily. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：S3 One Zone-IA 適合不常存取的資料。但由於資料僅儲存在一個可用區，可靠性較低，因此不適合日常存取部分資料的場景。結論：錯誤。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: S3 One Zone-IA is suitable for data that is accessed infrequently. However, since the data is only stored in one availability zone, the reliability is low and it is not suitable for scenarios where some data is accessed on a daily basis. Conclusion: Wrong.

D.zh: 正確。分析：S3智慧分層根據存取模式自動將資料移至性價比最高的儲存層，適合存取頻率不確定的數據，滿足每日存取部分資料和每年存取部分資料的需求。結論：。
D.en: Correct. Analysis: S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves data to the most cost-effective storage tier based on access patterns, which is suitable for data with uncertain access frequency and meets the needs of daily access to some data and annual access to some data. Conclusion:.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：S3智慧分層根據存取模式自動將資料移至性價比最高的儲存層，適合存取頻率不確定的數據，滿足每日存取部分資料和每年存取部分資料的需求。結論：。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves data to the most cost-effective storage tier based on access patterns, which is suitable for data with uncertain access frequency and meets the needs of daily access to some data and annual access to some data. Conclusion:.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 下列哪些是使用 AWS 雲端的經濟效益？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are economic benefits of using the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 基於消費的定價
A.en: Consumption-based pricing

B.zh: 永久許可證
B.en: Perpetual licenses

C.zh: 規模經濟
C.en: Economies of scale

D.zh: AWS 企業支持，無需額外付費
D.en: AWS Enterprise Support at no additional cost

A.zh: 正確。AWS 採用即用即付的定價模式。用戶只需為實際使用的資源付費，這是經濟效益的重要體現。
A.en: Correct. AWS adopts a pay-as-you-go pricing model. Users only pay for the resources actually used, which is an important manifestation of economic benefits.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS不採用永久授權模式，而是基於訂閱和按需付費，這與雲端運算的靈活性和經濟性是一致的。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS does not use a permanent license model, but is based on subscription and pay-as-you-go, which is consistent with the flexibility and economics of cloud computing.

C.zh: 正確。AWS透過大規模營運降低成本，並將這些成本節省轉嫁給客戶，這是雲端運算的重要經濟效益。
C.en: Correct. AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations and passes these cost savings to customers, which is an important economic benefit of cloud computing.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Enterprise Support 是一項付費服務，不包含在雲端經濟中。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Enterprise Support is a paid service and is not included in the economics of the cloud.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS 是一個完全託管的雲端服務平臺。用戶不需要自備硬體，這與雲端運算的經濟效益無關。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS is a fully managed cloud service platform. Users do not need to bring their own hardware, which has nothing to do with the economic benefits of cloud computing.

answer_text.zh: A. 基於消費的定價；C. 規模經濟
answer_text.en: A. Consumption-based pricing; C. Economies of scale

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 採用即用即付的定價模式。用戶只需為實際使用的資源付費，這是經濟效益的重要體現。；AWS透過大規模營運降低成本，並將這些成本節省轉嫁給客戶，這是雲端運算的重要經濟效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS adopts a pay-as-you-go pricing model. Users only pay for the resources actually used, which is an important manifestation of economic benefits.; AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations and passes these cost savings to customers, which is an important economic benefit of cloud computing.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 使用者正在將工作負載從本機資料中心移至分佈在本機資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間的架構。這是哪種類型的遷移？
question_text.en: A user is moving a workload from a local data center to an architecture that is distributed between the local data center and the AWS Cloud. Which type of migration is this?

A.zh: 本地到雲端原生
A.en: On-premises to cloud native

B.zh: 混合到雲端原生
B.en: Hybrid to cloud native

C.zh: 本地到混合
C.en: On-premises to hybrid

D.zh: 雲原生到混合
D.en: Cloud native to hybrid

A.zh: 錯誤。標題描述了本機資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間的工作負載分配。此架構是混合架構，並不是完全遷移到雲端原生架構。
A.en: Incorrect. The title describes the distribution of workloads between local data centers and the AWS cloud. This architecture is a hybrid architecture and is not a complete migration to a cloud-native architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。標題沒有提到從混合架構遷移到雲端原生架構，而是從本地資料中心遷移到混合架構。
B.en: Incorrect. The title does not mention migrating from a hybrid architecture to a cloud-native architecture, but rather migrating from a local data center to a hybrid architecture.

C.zh: 正確。標題明確指出工作負載分佈在本地資料中心和AWS雲端之間。這種類型的遷移是從本地資料中心到混合架構的遷移。
C.en: Correct. The title clearly states that the workload is distributed between the local data center and the AWS cloud. This type of migration is a migration from the local data center to a hybrid architecture.

D.zh: 錯誤。標題沒有提到從雲端原生架構遷移到混合架構，而是從本地資料中心遷移到混合架構。
D.en: Incorrect. The title does not mention migrating from cloud native architecture to hybrid architecture, but migrating from local data center to hybrid architecture.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (86%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：標題明確指出工作負載分佈在本地資料中心和AWS雲端之間。這種類型的遷移是從本地資料中心到混合架構的遷移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The title clearly states that the workload is distributed between the local data center and the AWS cloud. This type of migration is a migration from the local data center to a hybrid architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 某公司需要儲存不常用的數據，用於數據存檔和長期備份。哪種 AWS 服務或儲存類別能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to store infrequently used data for data archives and long-term backups. Which AWS service or storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: Amazon FSx for Lustre
A.en: Amazon FSx for Lustre

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
B.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

C.zh: Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

D.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier 彈性檢索
D.en: Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是一款高效能檔案伺服器，主要針對高吞吐量和低延遲工作負載（例如機器學習或高效能運算）而設計。它不適合長期存儲或不經常訪問的數據，所以這個選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon FSx for Luster is a high-performance file server designed primarily for high-throughput and low-latency workloads such as machine learning or high-performance computing. It is not suitable for long-term storage or infrequently accessed data, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS 是一種區塊儲存服務，適合運行 EC2 執行個體的高效能儲存需求。 EBS價格昂貴，不適合長期儲存或低頻存取數據，所以這個選擇是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS is a block storage service suitable for the high-performance storage needs of running EC2 instances. EBS is expensive and not suitable for long-term storage or low-frequency access to data, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 是一種可擴充檔案儲存服務，用於多個 EC2 執行個體的共用儲存。儘管EFS支援生命週期管理來優化成本，但其成本仍然高於專用於歸檔的儲存服務，因此這個選擇是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS is a scalable file storage service for shared storage of multiple EC2 instances. Although EFS supports lifecycle management to optimize costs, its cost is still higher than storage services dedicated to archiving, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是專為長期儲存和低頻存取資料而設計的儲存設備。它具有極低的儲存成本並提供靈活的檢測選項。這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a storage device specifically designed for long-term storage and low-frequency access to data. It has extremely low storage costs and provides flexible detection options. This option is.

answer_text.zh: D. Amazon S3 Glacier 彈性檢索
answer_text.en: D. Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是專為長期儲存和低頻存取資料而設計的儲存設備。它具有極低的儲存成本並提供靈活的檢測選項。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a storage device specifically designed for long-term storage and low-frequency access to data. It has extremely low storage costs and provides flexible detection options. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務為使用者提供 AWS 發布的報告、認證、鑑定和第三方證明？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides users with AWS issued reports, certifications, accreditations, and third-party attestations?

A.zh: AWS 神器
A.en: AWS Artifact

B.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
B.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

C.zh: AWS 運作狀況儀錶板
C.en: AWS Health Dashboard

D.zh: AWS 配置
D.en: AWS Config

A.zh: 正確。AWS Artifact 是一個自助服務門戶，提供合規性相關文檔，包括 AWS 報告、認證、第三方認證等。這正是問題中要求的功能。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a self-service portal that provides compliance-related documents, including AWS reports, certifications, third-party certifications, etc. This is exactly the function requested in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Trusted Advisor 主要用於檢查使用者的 AWS 環境並提供最佳化建議（例如成本節省、安全性、效能等），而不是提供合規性文件。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is mainly used to check the user's AWS environment and provide optimization recommendations (such as cost savings, security, performance, etc.) rather than providing compliance documents.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Health Dashboard 提供與 AWS 服務運作狀態相關的信息，以協助使用者了解服務中斷或事件的影響，但與合規性文件無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Health Dashboard provides information related to the operating status of AWS services to help users understand the impact of service interruptions or events, but has nothing to do with compliance documents.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 用於記錄和審核資源配置變更並協助使用者管理合規性，但它不提供 AWS 報告、認證或第三方認證。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Config is used to record and audit resource configuration changes and help users manage compliance, but it does not provide AWS reports, certifications or third-party certifications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Artifact 是一個自助服務門戶，提供合規性相關文檔，包括 AWS 報告、認證、第三方認證等。這正是問題中要求的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a self-service portal that provides compliance-related documents, including AWS reports, certifications, third-party certifications, etc. This is exactly the function requested in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要建立和發布互動式商業智慧儀錶板。儀錶板需要由機器學習提供支援的見解。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to create and publish interactive business intelligence dashboards. The dashboards require insights that are powered by machine learning. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Glue Studio
A.en: AWS Glue Studio

B.zh: 亞馬遜 QuickSight
B.en: Amazon QuickSight

C.zh: 亞馬遜紅移
C.en: Amazon Redshift

D.zh: 亞馬遜雅典娜
D.en: Amazon Athena

A.zh: 錯誤。是一個用於建立、運行和監控資料整合工作流程的視覺化工具。它主要用於資料預處理和 ETL（提取、轉換、載入）任務，而不是建立和發布互動式商業智慧儀錶板。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a visual tool for creating, running, and monitoring data integration workflows. It is primarily used for data preprocessing and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tasks rather than creating and publishing interactive business intelligence dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。是一種商業智慧服務，可建立和發布互動式儀錶板，並可透過預測和異常檢測等內建機器學習功能提供資料見解。這是題要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. is a business intelligence service that enables the creation and publishing of interactive dashboards and can provide data insights through built-in machine learning capabilities such as prediction and anomaly detection. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種資料倉儲服務，主要用於儲存和查詢大規模結構化資料。雖然它可以作為數據分析的基礎，但它本身並沒有提供創建和發布互動式儀錶板的功能。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a data warehouse service primarily used to store and query large-scale structured data. While it can serve as a basis for data analysis, it does not natively provide the functionality to create and publish interactive dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一項互動式查詢服務，用於分析 Amazon S3 中儲存的資料。它適合執行SQL查詢，但不支援建立和發布互動式儀錶板。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3. It is suitable for executing SQL queries, but does not support creating and publishing interactive dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種商業智慧服務，可建立和發布互動式儀錶板，並可透過預測和異常檢測等內建機器學習功能提供資料見解。這是題要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a business intelligence service that enables the creation and publishing of interactive dashboards and can provide data insights through built-in machine learning capabilities such as prediction and anomaly detection. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要使用 AWS。該公司對本地系統的低延遲存取和資料駐留有嚴格的要求。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務來設計符合這些要求的解決方案？
question_text.en: A company wants to use AWS. The company has stringent requirements about low-latency access to on-premises systems and data residency. Which AWS service should the company use to design a solution that meets these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 波長
A.en: AWS Wavelength

B.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
B.en: AWS Transit Gateway

C.zh: AWS 地面站
C.en: AWS Ground Station

D.zh: AWS 前哨站
D.en: AWS Outposts

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Wavelength主要用於將AWS服務延伸到電信營運商5G網路邊緣，以支援超低延遲的應用場景，但它並未直接解決資料駐留或與本地系統整合的問題。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Wavelength is mainly used to extend AWS services to the edge of telecom operators' 5G networks to support ultra-low latency application scenarios, but it does not directly solve the problem of data residency or integration with local systems.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Transit Gateway 用於連接多個 VPC 和本地網絡，但主要是一種網路連接解決方案，無法滿足資料駐留的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Transit Gateway is used to connect multiple VPCs and local networks, but it is mainly a network connection solution and cannot meet the requirements of data residency.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Ground Station 是一項獨立於低延遲存取和資料駐留的衛星通訊服務。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Ground Station is a satellite communications service that is independent of low-latency access and data residency.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Outposts 是一種混合雲端解決方案，可將 AWS 服務擴展到本機資料中心，以滿足低延遲存取和資料駐留需求。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that extends AWS services to local data centers to meet low-latency access and data residency needs.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Outposts 是一種混合雲端解決方案，可將 AWS 服務擴展到本機資料中心，以滿足低延遲存取和資料駐留需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that extends AWS services to local data centers to meet low-latency access and data residency needs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司為客戶經營本地聯絡中心。該公司需要遷移到基於雲端的解決方案，該解決方案可以提供人工智慧功能以改善用戶體驗。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an on-premises contact center for customers. The company needs to migrate to a cloud-based solution that can deliver artificial intelligence features to improve user experience. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 波長
A.en: AWS Wavelength

B.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心（AWS 單一登入）
B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: 亞馬遜連接
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。主要用於將AWS服務擴展到5G網路邊緣，以實現低延遲應用程式。這與問題中提到的將客戶互動中心遷移到雲端無關，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is mainly used to extend AWS services to the edge of 5G networks to enable low-latency applications. This has nothing to do with migrating the customer interaction center to the cloud as mentioned in the question, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS IAM Identity Center用於集中管理使用者存取權限，與問題中提到的客戶互動中心和人工智慧功能無關，因此該選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS IAM Identity Center is used to centrally manage user access rights and has nothing to do with the customer interaction center and artificial intelligence functions mentioned in the question, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。用於在本地資料中心和AWS之間建立私有網路連線。雖然它可以用於遷移，但它不提供客戶互動中心或人工智慧功能，因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is used to establish a private network connection between the local data center and AWS. Although it can be used for migration, it does not provide customer interaction center or artificial intelligence capabilities, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是一種雲端聯絡中心解決方案，支援客戶互動並整合人工智慧功能（例如 Amazon Lex 和 Amazon Polly）以改善使用者體驗。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a cloud contact center solution that supports customer interactions and integrates artificial intelligence capabilities (such as Amazon Lex and Amazon Polly) to improve the user experience. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種雲端聯絡中心解決方案，支援客戶互動並整合人工智慧功能（例如 Amazon Lex 和 Amazon Polly）以改善使用者體驗。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud contact center solution that supports customer interactions and integrates artificial intelligence capabilities (such as Amazon Lex and Amazon Polly) to improve the user experience. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要有能力在需要資源時取得資源。公司還需要能夠在不再需要資源時釋放資源。哪個 AWS 概念代表了公司的目標？
question_text.en: A company needs the ability to acquire resources when the resources are needed. The company also needs the ability to release the resources when the resources are no longer needed. Which AWS concept represents the company's goals?

A.zh: 可擴展性
A.en: Scalability

B.zh: 可持續性
B.en: Sustainability

C.zh: 彈性
C.en: Elasticity

D.zh: 卓越運營
D.en: Operational excellence

A.zh: 錯誤。指系統隨著需求成長而擴展資源以適應更高負載需求的能力。雖然與彈性相關，但它強調的是擴展能力而不是按需釋放資源。杯子選項錯誤。
A.en: Incorrect. refers to the system's ability to expand resources as demand grows to accommodate higher load demands. Although related to elasticity, it emphasizes the ability to scale rather than releasing resources on demand. The cup option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。通常與環境責任有關，指的是減少資源消耗和碳足跡。這與按需獲取和釋放資源的能力無關，因為cup選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is often associated with environmental responsibility, which refers to reducing resource consumption and carbon footprint. This has nothing to do with the ability to acquire and release resources on demand, because the cup option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是AWS的核心概念之一，指的是根據需求動態調整資源，包括按需擴展和收縮資源。這是問題中描述的目標，所以杯子和杯子的選項是。
C.en: Correct. is one of the core concepts of AWS, which refers to dynamically adjusting resources according to demand, including expanding and shrinking resources on demand. This is the goal described in the question, so the cup and cup options are.

D.zh: 錯誤。是 AWS 架構完善的框架的支柱。它關係到優化營運流程、提高效率。與資源的動態調整沒有直接關係。由於選擇錯誤。
D.en: Incorrect. is a pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework. It is related to optimizing operational processes and improving efficiency. It is not directly related to the dynamic adjustment of resources. Due to the wrong options.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是AWS的核心概念之一，指的是根據需求動態調整資源，包括按需擴展和收縮資源。這是問題中描述的目標，所以杯子和杯子的選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is one of the core concepts of AWS, which refers to dynamically adjusting resources according to demand, including expanding and shrinking resources on demand. This is the goal described in the question, so the cup and cup options are.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體來實現運作 1 年的穩定生產工作負載。哪一種實例購買選項最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use Amazon EC2 instances for a stable production workload that will run for 1 year. Which instance purchasing option meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 專用主機
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: 預留實例
B.en: Reserved Instances

C.zh: 按需實例
C.en: On-Demand Instances

D.zh: Spot 實例
D.en: Spot Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。提供實體伺服器的獨佔使用權，適用於需要滿足合規性或軟體授權要求的場景。生產成本較高，不適合某些生產工作負載的成本最佳化需求，因此此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. provide exclusive use rights to physical servers and are suitable for scenarios where compliance or software licensing requirements need to be met. The production cost is higher and is not suitable for the cost optimization needs of certain production workloads, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。允許使用者為長期工作負載預留容量，從而顯著節省成本（高達 72%）。對於運行 1 年的固定生產工作負載，這是最具成本效益的選項，因此這是正確的選項。
B.en: Correct. allow users to reserve capacity for long-term workloads, providing significant cost savings (up to 72%). For a fixed production workload running for 1 year, this is the most cost-effective option, so this is the correct option.

C.zh: 錯誤。是即用即付的，適合週期性或不可預測的工作負載。雖然靈活，但成本較高且不適合長期生產工作負載，因此此選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. are pay-as-you-go and are suitable for periodic or unpredictable workloads. Although flexible, it is more expensive and not suitable for long-term production workloads, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。以低價提供未使用的 EC2 容量，但可能隨時中斷。它適合非任務關鍵型或可中斷的工作負載，不適合某些生產工作負載，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. provide unused EC2 capacity at a low price but may be interrupted at any time. It is suitable for non-mission-critical or interruptible workloads and is not suitable for certain production workloads, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：允許使用者為長期工作負載預留容量，從而顯著節省成本（高達 72%）。對於運行 1 年的固定生產工作負載，這是最具成本效益的選項，因此這是正確的選項。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: allow users to reserve capacity for long-term workloads, providing significant cost savings (up to 72%). For a fixed production workload running for 1 year, this is the most cost-effective option, so this is the correct option.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望安全登入 Linux Amazon EC2 執行個體。公司如何實現這個目標？
question_text.en: A company wants to log in securely to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. How can the company accomplish this goal?

A.zh: 使用 SSH 金鑰。
A.en: Use SSH keys.

B.zh: 使用 VPN。
B.en: Use a VPN.

C.zh: 使用端對端加密。
C.en: Use end-to-end encryption.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53。
D.en: Use Amazon Route 53.

A.zh: 正確。SSH 是登入 Linux EC2 執行個體的建議方法。 AWS EC2執行個體使用SSH加密進行身份認證，確保安全。
A.en: Correct. SSH is the recommended method of logging into a Linux EC2 instance. AWS EC2 instances use SSH encryption for identity authentication to ensure security.

B.zh: 錯誤。VPN 主要用於安全連接到專用網絡，而不是直接登入 EC2 執行個體。
B.en: Incorrect. VPNs are primarily used to securely connect to private networks, rather than directly logging into EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。端對端加密是一種資料傳輸的加密機制，與登入EC2實例所使用的身份憑證沒有直接關係。
C.en: Incorrect. End-to-end encryption is an encryption mechanism for data transmission and has no direct relationship with the identity certificate used to log in to the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Route 53 是一項 DNS 服務，與登入 EC2 執行個體無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon Route 53 is a DNS service and has nothing to do with logging into EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 SSH 金鑰。

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：SSH 是登入 Linux EC2 執行個體的建議方法。 AWS EC2執行個體使用SSH加密進行身份認證，確保安全。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: SSH is the recommended method of logging into a Linux EC2 instance. AWS EC2 instances use SSH encryption for identity authentication to ensure security.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望為應用程式使用無伺服器運算服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use a serverless compute service for an application. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: AWS CloudFormation
B.en: AWS CloudFormation

C.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
C.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

D.zh: 彈性負載平衡
D.en: Elastic Load Balancing

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS Lambda 是一種完全與伺服器無關的運算服務，可讓使用者在不管理伺服器的情況下執行程式碼。它是專門為支援無伺服器架構而設計的服務。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a completely server-agnostic computing service that allows users to run code without managing servers. It is a service specifically designed to support serverless architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CloudFormation 是一項基礎架構即程式碼 (IaC) 服務，用於定義和管理 AWS 資源，但它不是運算服務，也不支援無伺服器架構。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an Infrastructure as Code (IaC) service for defining and managing AWS resources, but it is not a compute service and does not support Serverless architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是一種平臺即服務 (PaaS)。雖然它簡化了應用程式部署，但仍然需要底層伺服器的管理，因此它不是 Serverless 服務。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Elastic Beanstalk is a Platform as a Service (PaaS). Although it simplifies application deployment, it still requires management of the underlying server, so it is not a Serverless service.

D.zh: 錯誤。Elastic Load Balancing 是一種負載平衡服務，用於將流量分發到多個目標執行個體或容器，但它不是運算服務，不支援無伺服器架構。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Elastic Load Balancing is a load balancing service used to distribute traffic to multiple target instances or containers, but it is not a computing service and does not support serverless architecture.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS Lambda 是一種完全與伺服器無關的運算服務，可讓使用者在不管理伺服器的情況下執行程式碼。它是專門為支援無伺服器架構而設計的服務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a completely server-agnostic computing service that allows users to run code without managing servers. It is a service specifically designed to support serverless architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要一種解決方案，能夠根據目前負載自動調整正在使用的 Amazon EC2 執行個體的數量。哪種 AWS 產品可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a solution that will automatically adjust the number of Amazon EC2 instances that are being used based on the current load. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 專用主機
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: 歸置組
B.en: Placement groups

C.zh: 自動縮放組
C.en: Auto Scaling groups

D.zh: 預留實例
D.en: Reserved Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。是用於提供管理伺服器的專用主機，適用於需要合規或權限的場景。它不具備根據負載自動調整EC2執行個體數量的功能，因為使用了錯誤的選項。
A.en: Incorrect. are dedicated hosts used to provide management servers, and are suitable for scenarios where compliance or permission is required. It does not have the function of automatically adjusting the number of EC2 instances according to the load, because the wrong option is used.

B.zh: 錯誤。用於最佳化EC2實例之間的網路效能或分配策略，主要應用於高效能運算場景。它與自動縮放實例數量無關，因為該選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. are used to optimize network performance or distribution strategies between EC2 instances, mainly used in high-performance computing scenarios. It has nothing to do with autoscaling the number of instances, as the option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是AWS提供的功能，可根據負載自動調整EC2執行個體的數量，以確保應用程式效能和成本最佳化。杯子選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a feature provided by AWS that automatically adjusts the number of EC2 instances based on load to ensure application performance and cost optimization. The cup options are.

D.zh: 錯誤。是長期預留 EC2 執行個體以降低成本的選項。由於選項錯誤，它不具備動態調整實例數量的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. is an option for long-term reservation of EC2 instances to reduce costs. It does not have the function of dynamically adjusting the number of instances because of the wrong option.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是AWS提供的功能，可根據負載自動調整EC2執行個體的數量，以確保應用程式效能和成本最佳化。杯子選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a feature provided by AWS that automatically adjusts the number of EC2 instances based on load to ensure application performance and cost optimization. The cup options are.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在建立 AWS 架構，將即時資料來源從本地資料中心傳送到在 AWS 上執行的應用程式。該公司需要具有最小延遲的一致網路連線。公司應該使用什麼來連接應用程式和資料中心來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building AWS architecture to deliver real-time data feeds from an on-premises data center into an application that runs on AWS. The company needs a consistent network connection with minimal latency. What should the company use to connect the application and the data center to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Direct Connect
A.en: AWS Direct Connect

B.zh: 公共網際網路
B.en: Public internet

C.zh: AWS VPN
C.en: AWS VPN

D.zh: 亞馬遜連接
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS Direct Connect 是一種專用的網路連接服務，可提供穩定、低延遲的連接，適用於需要高效能和一致網路連接的場景。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a dedicated network connection service that provides stable, low-latency connections and is suitable for scenarios that require high performance and consistent network connections.

B.zh: 錯誤。公共網路存取可能會受到網路擁塞和不穩定的影響，並且無法保證低延遲和一致性。
B.en: Incorrect. Public Internet access may be affected by network congestion and instability, and low latency and consistency are not guaranteed.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS VPN可以提供安全連接，但它依賴公共網際網路，因此無法保證低延遲和穩定性。
C.en: Incorrect. Although AWS VPN can provide a secure connection, it relies on the public Internet and therefore cannot guarantee low latency and stability.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Connect 是聯絡中心服務，與網路連線無關，不適合此場景。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a contact center service that has nothing to do with network connectivity and is not suitable for this scenario.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS Direct Connect 是一種專用的網路連接服務，可提供穩定、低延遲的連接，適用於需要高效能和一致網路連接的場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a dedicated network connection service that provides stable, low-latency connections and is suitable for scenarios that require high performance and consistent network connections.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃將其自訂行銷應用程式和訂單處理應用程式遷移到 AWS。該公司需要將應用程式部署在具有不同CPU、記憶體、儲存和網路容量配置的不同類型的實例上。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to migrate its custom marketing application and order-processing application to AWS. The company needs to deploy the applications on different types of instances with various configurations of CPU, memory, storage, and networking capacity. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
B.en: Amazon Cognito

C.zh: 亞馬遜雅典娜
C.en: Amazon Athena

D.zh: 亞馬遜 EC2
D.en: Amazon EC2

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，適合執行短期程式碼片段，而不是部署需要特定 CPU、記憶體、儲存和網路配置的應用程式。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service suitable for running short-lived snippets of code rather than deploying applications that require specific CPU, memory, storage, and network configurations.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Cognito 是一項用於使用者驗證和管理的服務，獨立於部署應用程式。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service for user authentication and management, independent of deploying applications.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Athena 是一項互動式查詢服務，用於分析 Amazon S3 中儲存的數據，而不是用於部署應用程式。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3, not for deploying applications.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon EC2（彈性運算雲端）提供可設定的虛擬伺服器實例，支援各種 CPU、記憶體、儲存和網路配置，適合部署自訂應用程式。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud) provides configurable virtual server instances that support various CPU, memory, storage, and network configurations and are suitable for deploying custom applications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EC2（彈性運算雲端）提供可設定的虛擬伺服器實例，支援各種 CPU、記憶體、儲存和網路配置，適合部署自訂應用程式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud) provides configurable virtual server instances that support various CPU, memory, storage, and network configurations and are suitable for deploying custom applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望監控和阻止其 Amazon CloudFront 發行版收到的惡意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests that its Amazon CloudFront distributions receive. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
A.en: Amazon GuardDuty

B.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
B.en: Amazon Inspector

C.zh: AWS WAF
C.en: AWS WAF

D.zh: 亞馬遜偵探
D.en: Amazon Detective

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種威脅偵測服務，可識別潛在的惡意活動和未經授權的行為，但它無法直接監視和阻止 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a threat detection service that identifies potentially malicious activity and unauthorized behavior, but it cannot directly monitor and block HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一項自動化安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式是否有安全漏洞，但與監控和封鎖 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求無關。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is an automated security assessment service that checks applications for security vulnerabilities, but it has nothing to do with the monitoring and blocking of HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是一種 Web 應用程式防火牆服務，旨在監視和阻止惡意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求。這正是題目要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a web application firewall service designed to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是用來調查和分析安全問題的服務，但它不能直接監控和阻止HTTP和HTTPS請求。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a service used to investigate and analyze security issues, but it cannot directly monitor and block HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種 Web 應用程式防火牆服務，旨在監視和阻止惡意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求。這正是題目要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a web application firewall service designed to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以託管 PostgreSQL 資料庫？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which AWS services can host PostgreSQL databases? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 亞馬遜 S3
A.en: Amazon S3

B.zh: 亞馬遜極光
B.en: Amazon Aurora

C.zh: 亞馬遜 EC2
C.en: Amazon EC2

D.zh: 亞馬遜 OpenSearch 服務
D.en: Amazon OpenSearch Service

E.zh: Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是一種對象儲存服務，主要用於儲存檔案和資料對象，不支援託管資料庫。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service, mainly used to store files and data objects, and does not support managed databases.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon Aurora 是一項高效能關聯式資料庫服務，支援 PostgreSQL 和 MySQL 資料庫引擎。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a high-performance relational database service that supports PostgreSQL and MySQL database engines.

C.zh: 正確。雖然Amazon EC2本身不是資料庫服務，但使用者可以在EC2執行個體上安裝並執行PostgreSQL資料庫，因此它可以託管PostgreSQL。
C.en: Correct. Although Amazon EC2 itself is not a database service, users can install and run a PostgreSQL database on an EC2 instance, so it can host PostgreSQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon OpenSearch Service 是一項用於搜尋和分析的服務，不支援託管 PostgreSQL 資料庫。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon OpenSearch Service is a service for search and analysis and does not support hosting PostgreSQL databases.

E.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 是一種文件儲存服務，主要用於儲存文件數據，不支援託管資料庫。
E.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS is a file storage service, mainly used to store file data and does not support managed databases.

answer_text.zh: B. 亞馬遜極光；C. 亞馬遜 EC2
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Aurora; C. Amazon EC2

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Aurora 是一項高效能關聯式資料庫服務，支援 PostgreSQL 和 MySQL 資料庫引擎。；雖然Amazon EC2本身不是資料庫服務，但使用者可以在EC2執行個體上安裝並執行PostgreSQL資料庫，因此它可以託管PostgreSQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a high-performance relational database service that supports PostgreSQL and MySQL database engines.; Although Amazon EC2 itself is not a database service, users can install and run a PostgreSQL database on an EC2 instance, so it can host PostgreSQL.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可以產生可供外部稽核員使用的資訊？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can generate information that can be used by external auditors?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
A.en: Amazon Cognito

B.zh: 亞馬遜 FSx
B.en: Amazon FSx

C.zh: AWS 配置
C.en: AWS Config

D.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
D.en: Amazon Inspector

A.zh: 錯誤。主要用於使用者認證和管理，幫助開發者輕鬆新增使用者註冊功能。它不涉及生成審計信息，因此該選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. is mainly used for user authentication and management, helping developers easily add user registration functions. It does not involve generating audit information, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種託管文件儲存服務，主要旨在提供高效能文件儲存。它沒有產生審計資訊的能力，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. is a managed file storage service primarily designed to provide high-performance file storage. It does not have the capability to generate audit information, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。是一項用於記錄和評估AWS資源配置狀態的服務。它可以產生詳細的資源配置歷史記錄和合規性報告，可供外部審計使用，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a service used to record and evaluate the configuration status of AWS resources. It can generate detailed resource configuration history and compliance reports that can be used by external audits, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一項自動化安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式的安全性和合規性。雖然它可以提供安全評估報告，但其主要功能不是產生資源配置資訊以供外部審計，因此該選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is an automated security assessment service that checks applications for security and compliance. Although it can provide security assessment reports, its primary function is not to generate resource configuration information for external auditing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項用於記錄和評估AWS資源配置狀態的服務。它可以產生詳細的資源配置歷史記錄和合規性報告，可供外部審計使用，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service used to record and evaluate the configuration status of AWS resources. It can generate detailed resource configuration history and compliance reports that can be used by external audits, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能需要網路服務供應商 (ISP) 和主機設施來實施？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature requires an internet service provider (ISP) and a colocation facility to be implemented?

A.zh: AWS VPN
A.en: AWS VPN

B.zh: 亞馬遜連接
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: 網際網路網關
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種虛擬私人網路服務，可透過 Internet 連接到 AWS 環境，無需 ISP 和專用實體設施（例如託管設施）。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a virtual private network service that connects to the AWS environment over the Internet without requiring an ISP and dedicated physical facilities (such as a colocation facility). Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種基於雲端的聯絡中心服務，完全託管在 AWS 上，不需要 ISP 或託管設施來實施。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a cloud-based contact center service that is fully hosted on AWS and does not require an ISP or colocation facility to implement. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是一種專用網路連線服務，需要透過 ISP 和託管設施與 AWS 建立專線連線。這是正確的答案。
C.en: Correct. is a dedicated network connection service that requires a dedicated line connection to AWS through ISP and colocation facilities. This is the correct answer.

D.zh: 錯誤。是用於將 VPC 連接到 Internet 的虛擬裝置。它不需要 ISP 或託管設施來實施。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a virtual device used to connect a VPC to the Internet. It does not require an ISP or colocation facility to implement it. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (75%)； A (25%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種專用網路連線服務，需要透過 ISP 和託管設施與 AWS 建立專線連線。這是正確的答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (75%); A (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a dedicated network connection service that requires a dedicated line connection to AWS through ISP and colocation facilities. This is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望其 Amazon EC2 執行個體能夠在高度可用的環境中運行，即使特定地理區域發生自然災害也是如此。哪種解決方案可以實現這一目標？
question_text.en: A company wants its Amazon EC2 instances to operate in a highly available environment, even if there is a natural disaster in a particular geographic area. Which solution achieves this goal?

A.zh: 在多個 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.

B.zh: 在多個邊緣位置使用 EC2 執行個體。
B.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.

C.zh: 在同一可用區但不同 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS Regions.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudFront，並將 EC2 執行個體配置為來源。
D.en: Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.

A.zh: 正確。AWS 區域是地理上分佈的獨立區域。跨多個Region的EC2實例可以保證即使一個Region因自然災害而不可用，其他Region仍然可以正常運行，從而實現高可用性。
A.en: Correct. AWS Regions are geographically distributed independent regions. EC2 instances across multiple Regions can ensure that even if one Region is unavailable due to a natural disaster, other Regions can still run normally, thus achieving high availability.

B.zh: 錯誤。Edge Locations 是 Amazon CloudFront 的用於內容分發的元件。它主要用於儲存和加速內容交付，不用於運行EC2實例。它們不能用於實現 EC2 執行個體的高可用性。
B.en: Incorrect. Edge Locations is Amazon CloudFront's groupware for content distribution. It is mainly used to store and accelerate content delivery, and is not used to run EC2 instances. They cannot be used to implement high availability of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。同一可用區不能跨越多個 AWS 區域。可用區屬於特定區域，因此該選項在技術上是可行的。
C.en: Incorrect. The same Availability Zone cannot span multiple AWS Regions. Availability Zones belong to a specific Region, so this option is technically.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudFront 是一項內容傳遞服務，用於加速內容交付，並非用於實現 EC2 執行個體的高可用性。 CloudFront雖然可以與EC2實例集成，但無法解決自然災害導致的Region不可用的問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudFront is a content distribution service that is used to accelerate content delivery and is not used to achieve high availability of EC2 instances. Although CloudFront can be integrated with EC2 instances, it cannot solve the problem of Region unavailability caused by natural disasters.

answer_text.zh: A. 在多個 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。
answer_text.en: A. Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 區域是地理上分佈的獨立區域。跨多個Region的EC2實例可以保證即使一個Region因自然災害而不可用，其他Region仍然可以正常運行，從而實現高可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Regions are geographically distributed independent regions. EC2 instances across multiple Regions can ensure that even if one Region is unavailable due to a natural disaster, other Regions can still run normally, thus achieving high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許在多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間共用檔案？
question_text.en: Which AWS service allows for file sharing between multiple Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: AWS Direct Connect
A.en: AWS Direct Connect

B.zh: AWS Snowball Edge
B.en: AWS Snowball Edge

C.zh: AWS 備份
C.en: AWS Backup

D.zh: Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)
D.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Direct Connect 是一項網路服務，用於在本機資料中心與 AWS 之間建立私人網路連接，不涉及檔案共用功能。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a network service used to establish a private network connection between a local data center and AWS and does not involve file sharing functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Snowball Edge 是一種資料遷移設備，主要用於將大量資料遷移到 AWS 雲，不適合即時檔案共用。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Snowball Edge is a data migration device mainly used to migrate large amounts of data to the AWS cloud and is not suitable for real-time file sharing.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Backup 是一項用於備份和還原資料的集中式備份服務。不支援文件共享功能。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Backup is a centralized backup service used to back up and restore data. It does not support file sharing functions.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon EFS 是完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間的檔案共用。
D.en: Correct. Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports file sharing among multiple Amazon EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: D. Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)
answer_text.en: D. Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EFS 是完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間的檔案共用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports file sharing among multiple Amazon EC2 instances.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 本公司需要管理 AWS Organizations 中同一組織內 AWS 帳戶的多個登入。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to manage multiple logins across AWS accounts within the same organization in AWS Organizations. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 VPC
A.en: Amazon VPC

B.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
B.en: Amazon GuardDuty

C.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
C.en: Amazon Cognito

D.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心
D.en: AWS IAM Identity Center

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon VPC（虛擬私有雲）用於建立隔離的網路環境，與管理使用者登入無關。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) is used to create an isolated network environment and has nothing to do with managing user logins.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一項威脅偵測服務，用於監控惡意活動，與使用者登入管理無關。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that monitors malicious activity and has nothing to do with user login management.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Cognito 主要用於管理應用程式的使用者驗證和授權，而不是跨 AWS 帳戶的登入管理。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is primarily used to manage user authentication and authorization for applications, not login management across AWS accounts.

D.zh: 正確。AWS IAM Identity Center（以前稱為 AWS SSO）是專門用於管理跨 AWS 帳戶登入的服務，支援集中式身分識別管理和單一登入功能。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO) is a service specifically used to manage cross-AWS account logins, supporting centralized identity management and single sign-on functions.

answer_text.zh: D. AWS IAM 身分中心

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS IAM Identity Center（以前稱為 AWS SSO）是專門用於管理跨 AWS 帳戶登入的服務，支援集中式身分識別管理和單一登入功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO) is a service specifically used to manage cross-AWS account logins, supporting centralized identity management and single sign-on functions.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon WorkSpaces。根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon WorkSpaces. Which task is the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 為每個 WorkSpaces 使用者帳戶設定多重身份驗證 (MFA)。
A.en: Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) for each WorkSpaces user account.

B.zh: 確保託管 WorkSpaces 的 AWS 基礎架構的環境安全。
B.en: Ensure the environmental safety and security of the AWS infrastructure that hosts WorkSpaces.

C.zh: 透過 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 為 WorkSpaces 使用者帳戶提供安全性。
C.en: Provide security for WorkSpaces user accounts through AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM).

D.zh: 設定 AWS CloudTrail 以記錄 API 呼叫和使用者活動。
D.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to log API calls and user activity.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定多重身份驗證 (MFA) 是客戶的責任，因為它屬於使用者帳戶管理和身份驗證的範圍，這是共享責任模型中客戶的責任。
A.en: Incorrect. Setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA) is the customer's responsibility as it falls under the umbrella of user account management and authentication, which is the customer's responsibility in the shared responsibility model.

B.zh: 正確。模型中，AWS負責其全球基礎設施的安全，包括資料中心管理安全、環境安全和硬體維護。這是 AWS 的責任。
B.en: Correct. model, AWS is responsible for the security of its global infrastructure, including data center management security, environment security, and hardware maintenance. This is AWS's responsibility.

C.zh: 錯誤。儘管 AWS 提供 IAM 服務，但配置和管理 IAM 策略是客戶的責任。客戶需要確保其用戶帳戶的安全。
C.en: Incorrect. Although AWS provides IAM services, configuring and managing IAM policies is the customer's responsibility. Customers are required to ensure the security of their user accounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。設定 AWS CloudTrail 是客戶的責任，因為它屬於客戶對其帳戶和服務的管理範圍。
D.en: Incorrect. Configuring AWS CloudTrail is the customer's responsibility, as it is within the customer's management of their account and services.

answer_text.zh: B. 確保託管 WorkSpaces 的 AWS 基礎架構的環境安全。
answer_text.en: B. Ensure the environmental safety and security of the AWS infrastructure that hosts WorkSpaces.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：模型中，AWS負責其全球基礎設施的安全，包括資料中心管理安全、環境安全和硬體維護。這是 AWS 的責任。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: model, AWS is responsible for the security of its global infrastructure, including data center management security, environment security, and hardware maintenance. This is AWS's responsibility.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將其公開網站遷移到 AWS。該公司希望在 AWS 上託管網站的網域。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its public website to AWS. The company wants to host the domain name for the website on AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: 亞馬遜 53 號公路
B.en: Amazon Route 53

C.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudFront
C.en: Amazon CloudFront

D.zh: AWS Direct Connect
D.en: AWS Direct Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，用於執行程式碼而無需管理伺服器。它與網域託管無關。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service for running code without managing servers. It has nothing to do with domain hosting.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon Route 53 是一項可擴展的雲端域名系統 (DNS) 服務，專為網域託管和管理而設計，使其成為託管網站域名的正確選擇。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a scalable cloud Domain Name System (DNS) service designed for domain name hosting and management, making it the right choice for hosting your website's domain names.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudFront 是一項內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 服務，用於加速內容分發，但不負責網域託管。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service that is used to accelerate content delivery, but it is not responsible for domain name hosting.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Direct Connect 是一項網路服務，用於在本地資料中心和 AWS 之間建立專用網路連接，獨立於網域託管。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a network service used to establish a private network connection between an on-premises data center and AWS, independent of domain name hosting.

answer_text.zh: B. 亞馬遜 53 號公路

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Route 53 是一項可擴展的雲端域名系統 (DNS) 服務，專為網域託管和管理而設計，使其成為託管網站域名的正確選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a scalable cloud Domain Name System (DNS) service designed for domain name hosting and management, making it the right choice for hosting your website's domain names.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用第三方身分提供者 (IdP)。該公司希望為其員工提供對 AWS 帳戶和服務的存取權限，而無需另一組登入憑證。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company uses a third-party identity provider (IdP). The company wants to provide its employees with access to AWS accounts and services without requiring another set of login credentials. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS 目錄服務
A.en: AWS Directory Service

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
B.en: Amazon Cognito

C.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心
C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center

D.zh: AWS 資源存取管理器 (AWS RAM)
D.en: AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM)

A.zh: 錯誤。主要用於與Microsoft Active Directory集成，以協助管理使用者和資源的身份驗證。雖然它可以提供身分識別管理功能，但它不直接支援透過第三方 IdP 單一登入 (SSO) 到 AWS 帳戶。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is mainly used to integrate with Microsoft Active Directory to help manage the authentication of users and resources. While it can provide identity management capabilities, it does not directly support single sign-on (SSO) to AWS accounts through third-party IdPs. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。主要用於為應用程式提供使用者身份驗證和管理功能。雖然它支援與第三方 IdP 集成，但其主要用途是為應用程式使用者提供身份驗證，而不是為員工提供對 AWS 帳戶和服務的存取權限。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is primarily used to provide user authentication and management capabilities to applications. While it supports integration with third-party IdPs, its primary use is to provide authentication for application users rather than providing employees with access to AWS accounts and services. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。（以前稱為 AWS Single Sign-On）支援與第三方 IdP 集成，並允許員工透過單一登入 (SSO) 存取多個 AWS 帳戶和服務，而無需額外的登入憑證。這是題要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) supports integration with third-party IdPs and allows employees to access multiple AWS accounts and services through single sign-on (SSO) without requiring additional login credentials. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS RAM 用於跨帳戶共享 AWS 資源，而不是用於管理使用者身分或提供單一登入功能。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS RAM is used to share AWS resources across accounts, not to manage user identities or provide single sign-on functionality. Therefore this option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS IAM 身分中心

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (79%)； B (16%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：（以前稱為 AWS Single Sign-On）支援與第三方 IdP 集成，並允許員工透過單一登入 (SSO) 存取多個 AWS 帳戶和服務，而無需額外的登入憑證。這是題要求的功能，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (79%); B (16%). Popular discussion and key point summary: (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) supports integration with third-party IdPs and allows employees to access multiple AWS accounts and services through single sign-on (SSO) without requiring additional login credentials. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務組合可用於將商業關係型資料庫移轉到 Amazon 管理的開源資料庫？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which combination of AWS services can be used to move a commercial relational database to an Amazon-managed open-source database? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)
A.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

B.zh: AWS 軟體開發套件 (SDK)
B.en: AWS software development kits (SDKs)

C.zh: AWS Schema 轉換工具
C.en: AWS Schema Conversion Tool

D.zh: AWS 系統管理器
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。AWS DMS 是一項專門用於遷移資料庫的服務，可協助將資料從來源資料庫遷移到目標資料庫。
A.en: Correct. AWS DMS is a service specifically designed to migrate databases and can help migrate data from source databases to target databases.

B.zh: 錯誤。SDK主要用於開發AWS服務以及與AWS服務交互，並非專門用於資料庫遷移的工具。
B.en: Incorrect. SDKs are mainly used for developing and interacting with AWS services, and are not tools specifically used for database migration.

C.zh: 正確。SCT 可以幫助將來源資料庫的架構轉換為目標資料庫的架構，這在遷移到不同類型的資料庫時特別有用。
C.en: Correct. SCT can help convert the schema of the source database to the schema of the target database, which is especially useful when migrating to a different type of database.

D.zh: 錯誤。Systems Manager 主要用於操作任務的管理和自動化，與資料庫遷移無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Systems Manager is primarily used for management and automation of operational tasks and has nothing to do with database migration.

E.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMR 是一項用於大數據處理的服務，與資料庫遷移無關。
E.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon EMR is a service for big data processing and has nothing to do with database migration.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)；C. AWS Schema 轉換工具
answer_text.en: A. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS); C. AWS Schema Conversion Tool

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS DMS 是一項專門用於遷移資料庫的服務，可協助將資料從來源資料庫遷移到目標資料庫。；SCT 可以幫助將來源資料庫的架構轉換為目標資料庫的架構，這在遷移到不同類型的資料庫時特別有用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DMS is a service specifically designed to migrate databases and can help migrate data from source databases to target databases.; SCT can help convert the schema of the source database to the schema of the target database, which is especially useful when migrating to a different type of database.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可讓使用者按需自助存取 AWS 合規性控制報告？
question_text.en: Which AWS service gives users on-demand, self-service access to AWS compliance control reports?

A.zh: AWS 配置
A.en: AWS Config

B.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
B.en: Amazon GuardDuty

C.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
C.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

D.zh: AWS 神器
D.en: AWS Artifact

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config主要用於資源配置的稽核和合規性檢查，幫助使用者追蹤AWS資源的配置變化，但不提供合規性控制報告。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Config is mainly used for auditing and compliance checking of resource configuration, helping users track configuration changes of AWS resources, but it does not provide compliance control reports.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別潛在的安全威脅，獨立於合規性控制報告。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats, independent of compliance control reporting.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Trusted Advisor 提供最佳化建議來幫助使用者提高安全性、效能和成本效率，但不提供合規性控制報告。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor provides optimization recommendations to help users improve security, performance, and cost efficiency, but it does not provide compliance control reports.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Artifact 是一個合規性報告門戶，讓使用者可以按需存取 AWS 的合規性控制報告和其他相關文件。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a compliance reporting portal that provides users with on-demand access to AWS' compliance control reports and other related documents.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Artifact 是一個合規性報告門戶，讓使用者可以按需存取 AWS 的合規性控制報告和其他相關文件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a compliance reporting portal that provides users with on-demand access to AWS' compliance control reports and other related documents.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心運行舊工作負載。該公司希望將工作負載遷移到 AWS。該公司不想對工作量進行任何改變。公司應該使用哪種遷移策略？
question_text.en: A company runs a legacy workload in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the workload to AWS. The company does not want to make any changes to the workload. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 回購
A.en: Repurchase

B.zh: 平臺重構
B.en: Replatform

C.zh: 重新主持
C.en: Rehost

D.zh: 重構
D.en: Refactor

A.zh: 錯誤。是指以新的解決方案取代現有應用，例如從自建系統遷移到SaaS解決方案。這種方法通常需要更換應用程序，不符合題中「不改變」的要求，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. refers to replacing existing applications with new solutions, such as migrating from self-built systems to SaaS solutions. This method usually requires replacing the application, which does not meet the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是指對應用程式進行輕微的最佳化或調整以適應雲端環境，例如資料庫或作業系統的變更。這種方法涉及到一定程度的修改，不符合題中「不修改」的要求，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. refers to slight optimization or adjustment of the application to adapt to the cloud environment, such as changes to the database or operating system. This method involves a certain degree of modification and does not meet the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。（也稱為「直接遷移」）是指將應用程式直接遷移到雲端環境，而不需要對應用程式進行任何修改。這完全符合題中「不改變」的要求，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. (also known as "lift-and-shift") refers to the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to the application. This fully complies with the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是指對應用程式進行重大修改或重新設計以充分利用雲端。這種方法需要對應用程式進行大量更改，不符合問題中「不更改」的要求，因此該選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. refers to the significant modification or redesign of an application to take full advantage of the cloud. This method requires a lot of changes to the application and does not meet the "no changes" requirement in the question, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：（也稱為「直接遷移」）是指將應用程式直接遷移到雲端環境，而不需要對應用程式進行任何修改。這完全符合題中「不改變」的要求，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: (also known as "lift-and-shift") refers to the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to the application. This fully complies with the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is.
